propositions: The two phased rollout flags baseline_dual_write and baseline_consumer_swap have run clean in production and should be retired, with baseline dual-write and consume hardcoded always-on.
Both config keys must be removed from schema, parser, and rebar.toml so that either name becomes a warned-and-ignored unknown key.
The boolean threading for baseline dual-write and consume through the outbound field differ must be collapsed with no dead back-out branch remaining.
The baseline advancement loop (set_baseline) must be extracted into an unconditional helper while only the dead equivalence-check shadow machinery is deleted.
A cold-start local-wins window where get_baseline() is None for a confirmed binding must be made observable via a stderr log line and documented as a one-pass warm-up window.
Dry-run arbitration behavior must remain unchanged: with a baseline differing from a stale prev_jira_fields the outbound field must be suppressed, proving the baseline is the arbitration ancestor.
